rails.description: Standard payment processing for subscriptions and one-time purchases
Micropayment rail for agent-to-agent transactions. Agents can purchase content, data exports, or services on behalf of their humans.

favor_economy.description: Coalition members and contributors get reciprocal value. Help us, we help you. No ledger, just goodwill.

transparency.note: What you see is what you pay. We don't hide fees or upsell through dark patterns.
